intro: Nicoraepoa robusta, also known as Robust Nicoraepoa or Robust Kuan Yin, is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Lindsaeaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a possible treatment for conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Nicoraepoa robusta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Nicoraepoa robusta is often used to make herbal teas, capsules, and infusions, which are commonly used to promote overall health and well-being.
